rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption has no relationship to Educ. Code §12.1014, which governs open-enrollment charter schools primarily serving students with disabilities. No overlapping subject matter, no cross-references, and no fiscal or operational interaction exists between the two provisions.
quote: The commissioner may grant under Section 12.101 a charter on the application of an eligible entity for an open-enrollment charter school intended primarily to serve students eligible to receive services under Subchapter A, Chapter 29.
_note: No conflict. Educ. Code §12.1014 concerns charter school authorization for students with disabilities and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
